com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
  • Enclosing class:
    PaymentRequest

    public static class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String AdditionalFees
      Additional fees.
      java.lang.String CustomerCode
      The reference identifier (e.g., Customer Code, Purchase Order Number, Cardholder Reference Number etc.) supplied by the commercial card cardholder.
      java.lang.String DestinationCountryCode
      Destination country code of the goods being shipped.
      java.lang.String DestinationZipCode
      The destination zip code.
      java.lang.String DiscountAmount
      Amount of any discount applied by the merchant, valid for Visa.
      java.lang.String DutyAmount
      Fee amount associated with the import of the purchased goods.
      java.lang.String FreightAmount
      Freight or shipping portion of the total transaction amount.
      java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail> LineItemDetails
      An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail.
      java.lang.String MerchantTaxID
      The merchant tax id.
      java.lang.String OrderDate
      Purchase order date and must be supplied in YYMMDD format, valid for Visa.
      java.lang.String PONumber
      The order number supplied by the merchant.
      java.lang.String ProductDescription
      The description of the purchase.
      java.lang.String ShipFromZipCode
      The ship from zip code.
      java.lang.String ShippingCompany
      The shipping company name or ID.
      java.lang.String ShippingTrackingNumber
      The shipment’s tracking number.
      java.lang.String SummaryCommodityCode
      An international description code of the overall goods or services being supplied.
      The acquirer bank or processor should provide the merchant an updated listing of currently defined codes.
      java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail> TaxDetails
      An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail.
      java.lang.String TaxExempt
      The indicator of tax exempt.
      0: not exempt.
      1:exempt
      java.lang.String TaxExemptID
      The tax exempt id.

    • Field Detail

      • PONumber

        public java.lang.String PONumber
        The order number supplied by the merchant.

        Attribute: ans..25

      • CustomerCode

        public java.lang.String CustomerCode
        The reference identifier (e.g., Customer Code, Purchase Order Number, Cardholder Reference Number etc.) supplied by the commercial card cardholder.

        Attribute: ans..17

      • TaxExempt

        public java.lang.String TaxExempt
        The indicator of tax exempt.
        0: not exempt.
        1:exempt

        Attribute: n..1

      • TaxExemptID

        public java.lang.String TaxExemptID
        The tax exempt id.

        Attribute: ans..12

      • MerchantTaxID

        The merchant tax id.

        Attribute: ans..15

      • DestinationZipCode

        public java.lang.String DestinationZipCode
        The destination zip code.

        Attribute: ans..9

      • ProductDescription

        public java.lang.String ProductDescription
        The description of the purchase.
        The value of the Transaction Advice Addendum field, displays descriptive information about a transaction on a customer's AMEX card statement.

        Attribute: ans..40

      • ShipFromZipCode

        public java.lang.String ShipFromZipCode
        The ship from zip code. Valid for Visa and MasterCard.

        Attribute: ans..9

      • DestinationCountryCode

        public java.lang.String DestinationCountryCode
        Destination country code of the goods being shipped. U.S. should utilize 840.

        Attribute: n..3

      • TaxDetails

        public java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail> TaxDetails
        An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail.

      • SummaryCommodityCode

        public java.lang.String SummaryCommodityCode
        An international description code of the overall goods or services being supplied.
        The acquirer bank or processor should provide the merchant an updated listing of currently defined codes. Valid for Visa.

        Attribute: ans..4

      • DiscountAmount

        public java.lang.String DiscountAmount
        Amount of any discount applied by the merchant, valid for Visa.

        Attribute: n..12

      • FreightAmount

        public java.lang.String FreightAmount
        Freight or shipping portion of the total transaction amount. , valid for Visa and MasterCard

        Attribute: n..12

      • DutyAmount

        public java.lang.String DutyAmount
        Fee amount associated with the import of the purchased goods. , valid for Visa and MasterCard.

        Attribute: n..12

      • OrderDate

        public java.lang.String OrderDate
        Purchase order date and must be supplied in YYMMDD format, valid for Visa.

        Attribute: n6

      • LineItemDetails

        public java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail> LineItemDetails
        An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail.

        public java.lang.String ShippingCompany
        The shipping company name or ID.

        Attribute: ans..50

        The shipment’s tracking number.
